title: Department Manager Vacancy at HomeTown - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at HomeTown - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at HomeTown are looking for an experienced Department Manager based out of Ghaziabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About HomeTown:
HomeTown is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HomeTown!
